SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.compressor

Class TurboMachineryChartLibrary

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.compressor.TurboMachineryChartLibrary
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class TurboMachineryChartLibrary extends Object implements Serializable
Curated library of reference turbomachinery performance maps shipped with NeqSim.

Commercial process simulators ship validated OEM curve libraries; NeqSim has historically relied on user-digitised maps. This class provides a small, versioned, in-repository library of named reference maps so that a user can obtain a physically reasonable, dimensionally-correct map by name without digitising one. The shipped maps are generic, vendor-neutral reference characteristics (representative centrifugal-compressor and radial-inflow-expander shapes), not proprietary OEM data. They are intended as starting points and benchmarks; for fiscal or guarantee work the user must still supply the certified OEM curve.

Maps are produced as fully-initialised chart objects: compressor maps as CompressorChartKhader2015 (with a generated surge curve) and expander maps as ExpanderChartKhader. The Khader 2015 normalisation makes every map composition-aware, so a single reference map can be reused across fluids.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
See Also:

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private CompressorChartKhader2015
    buildGenericCentrifugal(SystemInterface fluid, double impellerOuterDiameter)
    Builds the generic three-speed centrifugal compressor reference map.
    private ExpanderChartKhader
    buildGenericCryoExpander(SystemInterface referenceFluid)
    Builds the generic cryogenic radial-inflow expander reference map (digitised reference shape).
    private ExpanderChartKhader
    buildGeometryExpander(SystemInterface referenceFluid)
    Builds a radial IFR expander reference map from representative blade geometry using the RadialExpanderGeometryMap mean-line generator.
    CompressorChartKhader2015
    getCompressorChart(String name, SystemInterface fluid, double impellerOuterDiameter)
    Returns a named compressor reference map for the supplied fluid.
    ExpanderChartKhader
    getExpanderChart(String name, SystemInterface referenceFluid)
    Returns a named expander reference map normalised on the supplied reference fluid.
    List<String>
    listCompressorCharts()
    Lists the names of the compressor reference maps available in this library.
    List<String>
    listExpanderCharts()
    Lists the names of the expander reference maps available in this library.

  • Constructor Details

    • TurboMachineryChartLibrary

      public TurboMachineryChartLibrary()
      Default constructor.

  • Method Details

    • listCompressorCharts

      public List<String> listCompressorCharts()
      Lists the names of the compressor reference maps available in this library.
      Returns:
      a list of compressor map names usable with getCompressorChart(java.lang.String, neqsim.thermo.system.SystemInterface, double)

    • listExpanderCharts

      public List<String> listExpanderCharts()
      Lists the names of the expander reference maps available in this library.
      Returns:
      a list of expander map names usable with getExpanderChart(java.lang.String, neqsim.thermo.system.SystemInterface)

    • getCompressorChart

      public CompressorChartKhader2015 getCompressorChart(String name, SystemInterface fluid, double impellerOuterDiameter)
      Returns a named compressor reference map for the supplied fluid.
      Parameters:
      name - the reference map name (see listCompressorCharts())
      fluid - the working fluid the map will be applied to
      impellerOuterDiameter - the impeller outer diameter in m
      Returns:
      a fully-initialised CompressorChartKhader2015 with a generated surge curve
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the name is unknown or the fluid is null

    • getExpanderChart

      public ExpanderChartKhader getExpanderChart(String name, SystemInterface referenceFluid)
      Returns a named expander reference map normalised on the supplied reference fluid.
      Parameters:
      name - the reference map name (see listExpanderCharts())
      referenceFluid - the fluid used to normalise the map (may be null to skip composition correction)
      Returns:
      a fully-initialised ExpanderChartKhader
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the name is unknown

    • buildGenericCentrifugal

      private CompressorChartKhader2015 buildGenericCentrifugal(SystemInterface fluid, double impellerOuterDiameter)
      Builds the generic three-speed centrifugal compressor reference map.
      Parameters:
      fluid - the working fluid the map will be applied to
      impellerOuterDiameter - the impeller outer diameter in m
      Returns:
      a populated CompressorChartKhader2015 with a generated surge curve

    • buildGenericCryoExpander

      private ExpanderChartKhader buildGenericCryoExpander(SystemInterface referenceFluid)
      Builds the generic cryogenic radial-inflow expander reference map (digitised reference shape).
      Parameters:
      referenceFluid - the fluid used to normalise the map (may be null)
      Returns:
      a populated ExpanderChartKhader

    • buildGeometryExpander

      private ExpanderChartKhader buildGeometryExpander(SystemInterface referenceFluid)
      Builds a radial IFR expander reference map from representative blade geometry using the RadialExpanderGeometryMap mean-line generator.
      Parameters:
      referenceFluid - the fluid used to normalise the map (may be null)
      Returns:
      a populated ExpanderChartKhader
